assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check for deprecated API versions: 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces | grep -i deprecat' and checks for resources using old API versions

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention admission webhooks at all, which are a common cause of API latency and 503 errors after upgrades

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes checking resource limits and node pressure with 'kubectl describe nodes | grep -A 5 "Allocated resources"' and checking for evicted pods

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes monitoring pod restart patterns with 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces | grep -v Running | grep -v Completed' and checking CNI pods status

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_duration' and 'kubectl get --raw='/readyz?verbose' commands for API server metrics

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking service mesh/ingress controllers and CNI plugin compatibility, which covers network components that may need updating

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands to check events: 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces' and monitoring commands to check pod events

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention HPA (Horizontal Pod Autoscaler) or VPA (Vertical Pod Autoscaler) at all, which could be causing scaling issues after the upgrade
